name: Nikko
description: Nikko is a scenic destination in the Tochigi region of Japan, offering rich history and cultural attractions.
reservation: Required for limited express trains and ryokans.
parking: Extremely crowded during autumn leaves season.

itineraries.name: Plan A: World Heritage Sanctuaries
itineraries.description: A focused tour of the elaborately decorated shrines and temples.

steps.activity: Arrive in Nikko. Photograph the iconic red Shinkyo Bridge.
Explore Toshogu Shrine, the incredibly ornate mausoleum of Tokugawa Ieyasu.
Lunch featuring local Nikko Yuba (tofu skin) delicacies.
Visit Rinno-ji Temple and the quiet Futarasan Shrine.
Stroll along the Kanmangafuchi Abyss to see the row of stone Jizo statues.

itineraries.name: Plan B: Okunikko Nature Escape
itineraries.description: Skip the shrines and head higher up the mountains for waterfalls and lakes.

steps.activity: Take the bus up the winding Irohazaka Route to Okunikko.
Ride the elevator down to the base of Kegon Falls, one of Japan's top 3 waterfalls.
Lunch overlooking the beautiful Lake Chuzenji.
Hike the wooden boardwalks of the Senjogahara Marshland.
Soak your feet in the public footbaths at Yumoto Onsen before returning.

notes: Traffic jams to Okunikko are severe in October.
